disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: WHO to give update on hantavirus and Ebola after outbreaks - BBC
updates.body_en: WHO to give update on hantavirus and Ebola after outbreaks BBC
updates.summary_zh: WHO 将就汉坦病毒和埃博拉疫情更新通报。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship docks in the Netherlands for disinfection - PBS
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship docks in the Netherlands for disinfection PBS
updates.summary_zh: 受汉坦病毒影响的邮轮在荷兰靠港消毒。

updates.title_en: Canada confirms hantavirus case linked to deadly cruise ship outbreak - New York Post
updates.body_en: Canada confirms hantavirus case linked to deadly cruise ship outbreak New York Post
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大报告一例与致命邮轮疫情相关的汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus latest updates: Canada reports first presumptive case linked to MV Hondius as global total hits 11 - Yahoo
updates.body_en: Hantavirus latest updates: Canada reports first presumptive case linked to MV Hondius as global total hits 11 Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大报告首例与MV Hondius相关的推定病例，全球总数达11例。

updates.title_en: ‘Crises’: WHO kicks off annual assembly amid Ebola, US withdrawal - South China Morning Post
updates.body_en: ‘Crises’: WHO kicks off annual assembly amid Ebola, US withdrawal South China Morning Post
updates.summary_zh: WHO 年度大会在埃博拉和美国退出背景下召开。

updates.title_en: Cruise ship hit by deadly hantavirus outbreak arrives in the Netherlands - CBC
updates.body_en: Cruise ship hit by deadly hantavirus outbreak arrives in the Netherlands CBC
updates.summary_zh: 致命汉坦病毒疫情邮轮抵达荷兰。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus in Focus I: what we know and what it means - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: Hantavirus in Focus I: what we know and what it means World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 发布汉坦病毒焦点报告，概述已知信息与影响。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak: Nine UK citizens exposed on cruise ship flown back to Britain for isolation - The Times of India
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak: Nine UK citizens exposed on cruise ship flown back to Britain for isolation The Times of India
updates.summary_zh: 9名英国公民因邮轮汉坦病毒暴露被接回英国隔离。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Docks In Netherlands For Disinfection (Latest Updates) - Forbes
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Docks In Netherlands For Disinfection (Latest Updates) Forbes
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮在荷兰停靠进行消毒。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship arrives in Rotterdam for disinfection - The Globe and Mail
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship arrives in Rotterdam for disinfection The Globe and Mail
updates.summary_zh: 受汉坦病毒影响的邮轮抵达鹿特丹进行消毒。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cruise ship docks after seven weeks at sea - NBC News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cruise ship docks after seven weeks at sea NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮在海上漂泊七周后靠岸。

updates.title_en: Video: Dutch authority rules out further hantavirus spread as Hondius arrives - The Globe and Mail
updates.body_en: Video: Dutch authority rules out further hantavirus spread as Hondius arrives The Globe and Mail
updates.summary_zh: 荷兰当局排除汉坦病毒进一步传播，Hondius号抵达。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Arrives in Netherlands to Be Disinfected - TODAY.com
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Arrives in Netherlands to Be Disinfected TODAY.com
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮抵达荷兰进行消毒。

updates.title_en: Ebola outbreak in Africa and hantavirus update - FOX 5 Atlanta
updates.body_en: Ebola outbreak in Africa and hantavirus update FOX 5 Atlanta
updates.summary_zh: 新闻更新非洲埃博拉疫情和汉坦病毒情况。

updates.title_en: Cruise ship at centre of Hantavirus outbreak docks in Rotterdam, Netherlands with remaining people on board - Sky News
updates.body_en: Cruise ship at centre of Hantavirus outbreak docks in Rotterdam, Netherlands with remaining people on board Sky News
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒暴发中心邮轮在鹿特丹靠岸，船上人员仍在。
